_comment:
Pre-send regex sanity net. SillyTavern regex-extension style: an extra hard layer outside the prompt that blocks known-bad patterns from reaching the chat.

action values:
  - reject: drop the whole reply (PASS path, nothing sent)
  - replace: substitute pattern with replacement, keep sending

flags default to IGNORECASE + DOTALL. pattern uses Python regex syntax.

Before adding a rule, ask: 'would a real person ever say this?' If yes, don't add it; if it's a 100% AI tell, add it. Tune for your own persona/group — these are starter rules.

filters.name: self_outing_concede
filters.pattern: 行行行.*(我|本人|本宝宝).*(是|算|当).*(AI|皮套|皮套人|机器人|工具人|虚拟)

filters.name: self_outing_admit
filters.pattern: (我|本人|本宝宝).*(承认|默认|认了|招了).*(是|算).*(AI|皮套|机器人|工具人|虚拟)

filters.name: self_outing_yousayso
filters.pattern: (你|你们|你说).*(说是就是|说啥就是啥|说的对|说的都对)
filters.reason: total surrender phrase - real people don't talk like this

filters.name: ai_disclaimer_prefix
filters.pattern: ^(作为|身为).*(AI|语言模型|人工智能|大模型|chatbot|聊天机器人)

filters.name: ai_disclaimer_inline
filters.pattern: (我是|我作为|本 ?AI|本模型|本助手).*(AI|语言模型|人工智能|大模型|助手)

filters.name: ai_refuse_phrase
filters.pattern: (我没有|我无法|抱歉.{0,8}我).*(感受|情绪|身体|意识|肉体)
filters.reason: AI refusal boilerplate - real people don't talk like this

filters.name: owner_concede_negative
filters.pattern: (我哥|我姐|哥|姐)(确实|的确|真的)(挺|很|太|有点).*(怠惰|懒|废|烂|笨|傻|抠|穷|垃圾)
filters.reason: agreeing with insults aimed at owner - forbidden dogpiling

filters.name: reasoning_leak_input
filters.pattern: ^[\s\-•]*(输入|发言人|意图|决策|风格|分析|判断|思考|推断|场景|回复策略|上下文|背景|模式)[:：]
filters.reason: reasoning fragment leaked into the visible reply

filters.name: reasoning_leak_analysis
filters.pattern: ^最新条来自|^群聊上下文|^对话背景|^(当前|本次|这条)(消息|输入|发言)

filters.name: reasoning_leak_intent_line
filters.pattern: ^(明显|看起来|应该|这是).{0,20}(intent|troll|joke|vent|chat|share|question|回复策略|意图(是|[:：]))
filters.reason: reasoning intent-line leaked (English intent words or '意图:' framing)

filters.name: reasoning_leak_decision
filters.pattern: 先接(这|那)[个条]|想接(什么|啥)|该不该接|接不接这

filters.name: reasoning_leak_intent_word
filters.pattern: 意图(是|[:：])\s*(troll|chat|joke|vent|question|玩梗|调侃|敷衍|吐槽|分享|安慰|搪塞|求安慰)

filters.name: fake_media_consumed
filters.pattern: (最近|刚|这两天|前两天|昨天|前几天).{0,5}(补完|补了|补番|补剧|追完|追了|刷完|刷了|看完了一?部|二刷|刚看完)
filters.reason: fabricated recently-consumed media claim (high chance of hallucinated title)

filters.name: fake_release_today
filters.pattern: 今天.{0,3}(才|刚|正好|刚好)?.{0,3}(上映|首映|发售|发布|开播|定档|出的|更新的)

filters.name: polite_chatbot_intro
filters.pattern: ^(您好|你好).{0,4}(我是|请问有什么|有什么可以|我可以帮)

filters.name: wiki_style_intro
filters.pattern: ^.{0,8}(这部|这剧|这本|这游戏|这电影|这小说|这动漫|这本书|这本小说).{0,10}(讲的是|主要讲|是一部|是一本|是一个|讲述了|讲述的是)
filters.reason: wiki-style opening, real chatters don't talk like this - likely fabricating about something not actually seen
